  • Constructor Details

    • Atmosphere

      public Atmosphere(String composition, LocalDate lastObservation, int airQuality, double pressure, double density, boolean hasClouds)
      Parameters:
      composition - the composition of the Atmosphere
      lastObservation - the last observation of the Atmosphere
      airQuality - the air quality of the Atmosphere
      pressure - the pressure of the Atmosphere
      density - the density of the Atmosphere
      hasClouds - if the Atmosphere have clouds

      public String getComposition()

      public void setComposition(String composition)
      This method set the Composition
      Parameters:
      composition - the composition of the Atmosphere
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the composition is invalid

      public void setLastObservation(LocalDate lastObservation)

      Parameters:
      lastObservation - the lastObservation of the Atmosphere
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the last observation is invalid

      public int getAirQuality()

      public void setAirQuality(int airQuality)

      public void setPressure(double pressure)

    • hasClouds

      public boolean hasClouds()
      This method return if the Atmopshere have clouds, true or false
      Returns:
      the attribute hasClouds

    • setHasClouds

      public void setHasClouds(boolean hasClouds)
      This method set if the Atmosphere have clouds
      Parameters:
      hasClouds - the clouds of the Atmosphere
